name: kami
description: Professional document and landing-page typesetting skill for Codex: resumes, one-pagers, reports, letters, portfolios, slides, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Typeset polished documents and landing pages
interface.longDescription: Kami packages a warm parchment design system for Codex. Use it to turn briefs and raw material into resumes, one-pagers, long documents, letters, portfolios, slide decks, equity reports, changelogs, and product landing pages.
defaultPrompt: Make a polished one-pager from this brief
Turn this outline into a slide deck
